title: Custom Engraved Charcuterie Board
description: A beautiful wooden board engraved with your family name or a special date. Yours to use during the stay and take home.

title: Personalized Picnic Welcome Sign
description: A customized wooden sign (e.g., 'Happy Anniversary Sarah & John') displayed at your picnic setup.

title: Premium Proposal/Event Signage
description: Large acrylic or wood 'Will You Marry Me?' or 'Welcome' sign, styled with the setup.

title: Bay Breeze Keepsake Keychain
description: A small engraved wooden keychain featuring the coordinates of the bay.
